description_long: This street light features a tall, tapered vertical pole with a U-shaped channel running along its length, giving it a modern and minimalist appearance. The structure is composed of two main panels, one slightly inset, creating a subtle layered effect along the front. The top of the pole is flat and open, with no visible lamp head or decorative elements, suggesting a streamlined, utilitarian design. The surface appears smooth and metallic, likely made from steel or aluminum, with a matte gray finish. There are no visible fasteners, arms, or embellishments, emphasizing its functional and contemporary style. The overall form is slender and angular, suitable for urban environments where unobtrusive, modern lighting is desired.
description: A tall, tapered, U-channel street light pole with a smooth, matte gray metallic finish and minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the layered, U-shaped channel and the subtle step between the two main panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the tapering profile and the flat, featureless surface of the pole.
description_view_2: Rear angled view reveals the continuous, smooth back panel and the open channel running along the length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the same taper and layered effect as the front, with no additional features.
attribute_lamp_head_design: No distinct lamp head is visible; the top is flat and open, consistent with a minimalist, integrated design.
